creator: sales@psychsoftek.com
text: Psychsoft Consulting is an Industry recognized leading technology consulting firm based in Quincy, Massachusetts founded in 1987 with a highly educated, trained and experienced staff to help in all your IT needs. Psychsoft, Inc. personnel hold advanced degrees in various fields and have years of experience in IT implementation, troubleshooting, design and configuration. Areas of expertise include: Linux, Microsoft Windows, UNIX, TCP/IP, LAN, WAN, VPN, Network security, WIFI security, WIFI design, Database design, SQL, Web site design, Server design, System integration, Network printing and DSL/Broadband/T1 Internet access
